heartbeat.note: Live (age ~5s); uptime ~35m; last tick 13:09Z; deployed git_sha 52d929f8 (current with main).

services.note: ict-trader-live + ict-web-api up; diag relay + API serving; git-sync auto-deploying main.

live_accounts.note: alpaca_paper, breakout_1, bybit_1, bybit_2, ib_paper = live; ib_live & oanda_practice off (OANDA shelved per FX-sweep).

strategy_fleet.note: 36 strategies loaded & evaluating; chop regime on BTC (ADX ~16-17) -> fade/squeeze/scalp/fvg non-actionable (benign, no setups).

grading_pipeline.note: FIXED this session: VM->repo grading bridge built; now scores the live VM's fresh DB. 2492 packages graded incl. today; in-window packages now carry C/D grades. This was the 06-22/06-23 under-reporting cause.

signal_to_order_plumbing.note: In-window order packages orphaning at aggregated_target_qty=0 (BUG-049) -> signals size to zero, package created, then reconciler-orphaned ~5m later. Real execution is sparse as a result.

exit_path.note: All 5 in-window closes were closeReason=reconciler; none hit a clean TP/SL. Worth confirming the exit/monitor path is exiting on strategy logic, not just reconciliation.

diag_relay_allowlist.note: /api/bot/ml/status (and strategies, prop) are not on the vm-diag relay read allowlist -> a blind spot for ML registry detail over the issue relay (worked around via order-package modelScores + trainer relay).

model_status.note: Actively scoring in-window packages (e.g. 0.737). Shadow only.

ml._note: Fleet visibility from order-package modelScores (relay allowlist blocks /api/bot/ml/status). 8 models at shadow, actively scoring every package; none at advisory (promotion is operator-gated, as designed). Registry-level training detail not pulled this run.

consolidated.headline: Window 05:11Z->13:36Z. System healthy: heartbeat live, 36 strategies evaluating, deployed current. The grading lapse that under-reported the last two reports is RESOLVED (VM->repo bridge + live-DB freshness; 2492 packages graded incl. today). Real money ~flat (one BTC long -$1.64 on 0.001 sizing); paper +$110 in-window (-$4288/24h). CAUTION: in-window order packages orphan at target_qty=0 (BUG-049) and all closes were reconciler-driven, not clean TP/SL.

operator_priorities.title: Investigate zero-qty order packages orphaning (BUG-049)
operator_priorities.detail: Every in-window package shows aggregated_target_qty=0 -> created then reconciler-orphaned ~5m later. Signals generate but size to zero, so real execution is near-nil. Confirm whether this is correct sub-conviction sizing or a sizing/rounding defect.

operator_priorities.title: Exits are reconciler-driven, not TP/SL
operator_priorities.detail: All 5 in-window closes had closeReason=reconciler (incl. the real BTC trade and its paper twin). Verify the monitor/exit path is closing on strategy SL/TP, not relying on reconciliation.

operator_priorities.title: Paper reconciler closes show entry==exit with non-zero P&L
operator_priorities.detail: Paper ADA/XRP closes report +$507/+$333/+$98 with entryPrice==exitPrice -> likely a reconciler PnL-attribution artifact inflating paper P&L. Audit realizedPnl on reconciler closes.

operator_priorities.title: Add /api/bot/ml/status (+strategies, prop) to the vm-diag relay allowlist
operator_priorities.detail: These read-only endpoints aren't on the relay's path allowlist, so ML registry detail can't be pulled over the issue relay. A one-line allowlist add restores full report coverage.

operator_priorities.title: Optional: add GRADING_PAT secret for unattended grading auto-merge
operator_priorities.detail: The grading bridge opens a grades PR each run; without a GRADING_PAT it can't auto-merge (GITHUB_TOKEN PRs get no CI), so a session must adopt the branch. A fine-grained PAT (contents+PR write) makes it fully hands-off.

cross_review_notes: Grading lapse RESOLVED: built the VM->repo grading bridge (#4309), backfilled 1049 grades (#4312), made its auto-merge work (#4313), and fixed it to score the live VM's FRESH DB instead of the trainer's midnight-lagged copy (#4317) + graded today's packages (#4320). Journal now 2492 graded; in-window packages carry C/D grades. Root cause of the 06-22/06-23 under-reporting: report-mode was treated as read-only (process fix #4285) AND no automated commit path existed (this session).

Signal->order->exit plumbing theme: in-window packages orphan at target_qty=0 (BUG-049) AND all 5 closes were reconciler-driven (no clean TP/SL). Both point at the execution/exit path, not signal generation -- strategies evaluate normally; the market is in chop.

Real vs paper diverge sharply: real ~flat (-$1.64 in-window on 0.001 BTC sizing) while paper swings large (-$4288/24h, +$110 in-window). Paper sizing is far larger, so paper P&L does not reflect real money at risk -- the two are never blended.

Market backdrop: BTC -3.2% over the window (64,155 -> 62,093, low 61,934). The htf_pullback_trend_2h BTC long (real + paper twin) was a long into that slide -> both lost; closed by reconciler at 06:21Z.

market_context.note: Risk-off slide over the window; chop regime (ADX ~16-17). Other traded symbols not captured this run (single-symbol candle pull).

claude_grade.rationale: The only REAL-money close in-window: a BTC long into a -3.2% slide, closed by reconciler not a clean SL. Grading is live (in-window packages graded C/D); this trade's package->grade join not captured (relay 55kB truncation).
Paper twin of the real BTC long (same entry/exit, qty 506x larger). Same -3.2% slide loss, reconciler close. Illustrates how paper sizing dwarfs real.
Reconciler close with entryPrice==exitPrice yet +$507 realizedPnl -> likely a paper PnL-attribution artifact, not a genuine edge. Flagged for audit.
Same entry==exit reconciler-PnL artifact pattern as 2807.
